languages.text: "Скажите же, Ваша Светлость, отменяете ли вы Последний Приказ вашего святейшего предка, Себериана?"
languages.translation_comment: В начале куя Ведка поворачивается на РТ.
В начале куя Ведка поворачивается на РТ.

languages.text: "Tell us then, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}: do you revoke the Final Order of your most holy ancestor, Seberian?"
languages.original_text: "Скажите же, Ваша Светлость, отменяете ли вы Последний Приказ вашего святейшего предка, Себериана?"

traits.locale_text: "Tell us then, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}: do you revoke the Final Order of your most holy ancestor, Seberian?"
"Tell us then, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}: do you revoke the Final Order of your most holy ancestor, Seberian?"
"Tell us then, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}: do you revoke the Final Order of your most holy ancestor, Seberian?"
"Tell us then, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}: do you revoke the Final Order of your most holy ancestor, Seberian?"
"Tell us then, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}: do you revoke the Final Order of your most holy ancestor, Seberian?"

languages.text: “请告诉我们吧，大人。您是否会撤销您那位至圣先祖塞贝里安下达的最后的命令？”
languages.original_text: "Tell us then, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}: do you revoke the Final Order of your most holy ancestor, Seberian?"

traits.locale_text: “请告诉我们吧，大人。您是否会撤销您那位至圣先祖塞贝里安下达的最后的命令？”

languages.text: "O hâlde söyleyin bize {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri... Kutsal atanız Seberian'ın Son Emir'ini iptal ediyor musunuz?"
languages.original_text: "Tell us then, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}: do you revoke the Final Order of your most holy ancestor, Seberian?"

traits.locale_text: "O hâlde söyleyin bize {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri... Kutsal atanız Seberian'ın Son Emir'ini iptal ediyor musunuz?"

languages.text: « Alors, dites-nous, Votre Seigneurie : révoquez-vous l'Ordre ultime de Seberian, votre ancêtre sacré ? »
languages.original_text: "Tell us then, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}: do you revoke the Final Order of your most holy ancestor, Seberian?"

traits.locale_text: « Alors, dites-nous, Votre Seigneurie : révoquez-vous l'Ordre ultime de Seberian, votre ancêtre sacré ? »

languages.text: «Díganos, mi{mf|lord|lady}: ¿anula la orden final de su sacrosanto antepasado, Seberian?».
languages.original_text: "Tell us then, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}: do you revoke the Final Order of your most holy ancestor, Seberian?"

traits.locale_text: «Díganos, mi{mf|lord|lady}: ¿anula la orden final de su sacrosanto antepasado, Seberian?».

languages.text: "Also sagt uns, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}: Hebt Ihr den letzten Befehl Eures heiligen Ahnherren Seberian auf?"
languages.original_text: "Tell us then, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}: do you revoke the Final Order of your most holy ancestor, Seberian?"

traits.locale_text: "Also sagt uns, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}: Hebt Ihr den letzten Befehl Eures heiligen Ahnherren Seberian auf?"

languages.text: 「それでは、お言いかたを仰ぎます。聖なる祖先であるセベリアンの最終令を、お召し取りになるのですか？」
languages.original_text: "Tell us then, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}: do you revoke the Final Order of your most holy ancestor, Seberian?"

traits.locale_text: 「それでは、お言いかたを仰ぎます。聖なる祖先であるセベリアンの最終令を、お召し取りになるのですか？」
